channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Update / Trump postpones military strike on Iran infrastructure, tells AFP 'things going very well on Iran'
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Iran denies talks with US after Trump postpones strikes on power grid
- Iran Negotiations — or Not?
- Iranian officials dismiss claims of US talks
- Trump backs down from strikes on Iran’s power network: What we know so far
- Iran denies any talks with US after Trump claims ‘productive’ discussions
- Trump Delays Energy Strikes, but Iran’s Infrastructure is Already Battered
- Trump Delays Energy Strikes, but Iran’s Infrastructure is Already Battered
- Iran’s parliament speaker denies there have been any negotiations with the US
- Iranian parliament speaker says 'no negotiations' between US and Iran
- Iran denies engaging in talks with US after Trump claims Kushner, Witkoff held meeting
- Iran's parliament speaker denies there have been negotiations with the US
- Tehran Not Holding Talks With Washington - Iranian Foreign Ministry
- Trump Says US Not Negotiating With Iranian Leader Khamenei in Ongoing Talks
- Conflicting reports on talks, pause in strikes on energy sites: statements from Iran, US
- Trump: US isn't negotiating with Iran's supreme leader
- Iran denies talks with US, contradicts Trump’s claims
- Trump backs down on strikes on Iran’s power network, claims US and Tehran holding talks
- ‘Scared Trump backs down’: Iran reacts to Trump’s 5-day pause on attacks, denies any talks with US
- Trump halts US strikes on power plants after 'very good conversations' with Iran
- Trump halts US strikes on power plants after 'very good conversations' with Iran
- Trump backs down on strikes on Iran’s power network, says US and Tehran holding talks
- Urgent: Trump says U.S. halts strikes on Iran's power plants, energy infrastructure for 5 days
- Flash: Trump says to postpone military strikes against Iran's power plants, energy infrastructure for 5 days
- 'Ordered Dept of War to…': Trump halts Iran energy infra strikes for 5 days, cites 'productive' talks
- Iran Denies Talks with US as Pezeshkian Dismisses Trump’s 'Productive' Claims
- Iran in no talks with US — media
- Trump postpones military strikes on Iranian power plants
- Trump postpones military strikes on Iranian power plants
- Trump postpones military strikes on Iranian power plants
- Trump says US will halt military strikes on Iranian power plants for 5 days
- Trump postpones military strikes on Iranian power plants
- Trump postpones military strikes on Iranian power plants
- Trump has ‘backed down’: Iran after US President pauses strikes, backs talks
- US, Iran holding talks, says Trump; announces 5-day pause on attacks on energy sites
- Trump signals five-day pause on US strikes on Iran energy infrastructure
- Trump backs down on strikes on Iran’s power network, says US and Tehran holding talks
- Iran awaits Trump threat to ‘obliterate’ power plants, readies response]]>

- Iran war: Trump claims US has held talks with Iran
- LIVE UPDATES: Trump Teases ‘Complete And Total Resolution’ To War In Iran
- Trump claims again that Iran wants to 'make a deal' despite Iranian denials
- Trump says U.S. is negotiating end to war with Iran

item.title: Trump says talks underway with Iranian figure, extends deadline on Strait of Hormuz standoff
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Signs emerge Trump ready to end Iran war as pressure mounts over Hormuz
- US wants to wind down Iran war by mid-April ahead of Trump's Israel Prize awarding — Ynet
- Trump Sets April 9 Deadline for Iran War: Washington Claims Progress While Tehran Rejects Talks
- Strait of Hormuz to be "open very soon,” Trump says he will jointly control passage with Iran's Ayatollah
- Trump expects progress on halting hostilities with Iran within five days — TV
- Trump pitches shared US-Iran Strait of Hormuz control, claims regime change 'already happened'
- US eyes taking over Strait of Hormuz as final Iran 'endgame' move — media
- Trump's changing course on Strait of Hormuz strategy raises questions about US war preparation
- FirstFT: Donald Trump pushes Iran war to new escalatory phase with Hormuz ultimatum
- Donald Trump’s changing course on Strait of Hormuz strategy raises questions about U.S. war preparation]]>

item.title: 'Don’t forget 1980s failure': Iran warns of naval mines in Persian Gulf if US, Israel attack its coasts, islands
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Iran Threatens to Lay Mines Across Entire Persian Gulf If Coastal Attack Happens
- Iran's Defense Council threatens to deploy naval mines across the 'entire Persian Gulf' if a land invasion happens
- Middle East war: Iran says coastal attack will lead to full Gulf closure and mine-laying
- Iran says coastal attack will lead to full Gulf closure and mine-laying
- Iran says coastal attack will lead to full Gulf closure and mine-laying
- Iran says coastal attack will lead to full Gulf closure and mine-laying]]>

item.title: Slovenia's liberals and populists neck and neck, preliminary results show
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Slovenia’s liberals and populists neck and neck, preliminary results show
- Election in Slovenia Is a Near Tie
- Slovenia’s liberal premier claims narrow victory over Trump ally
- Pro-EU liberals see narrow win in Slovenia as key Italian referendum enters final hours – Europe live
- Slovenia’s Governing Liberals Narrowly Defeat Right-Wing Challenge at Polls
- Slovenia election too close to call as PM claims victory in neck-and-neck race]]>

item.title: Israeli military says it is conducting strikes in Tehran
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Iran’s IRGC confirms delivering missile strikes on Dimona, Eilat in Israel, US army bases
- Iranian missiles strike central Israel amid interception challenges
- Urgent: Israeli army says conducting strikes in "heart of Tehran"]]>

item.title: Israel admits slain farmer was hit by its own fire, not Hezbollah
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Israel Says Its Own Artillery Killed a Farmer, Not a Hezbollah Rocket
- Israel Says Its Own Artillery Killed a Farmer, Not a Hezbollah Rocket
- Israeli army confirms own artillery fire killed civilian near Lebanon border
- Israel military says friendly fire killed civilian near Lebanon border]]>
